title: Mysterious Mountain Lib
body:
Welcome to Mysterious Mountain Lib, a library for MMF-Group's mod.  
Just a library for coder, and a welcome info for players want to know Zheng's other mods.  

Features:  
> Base Blocks, Items Class for easier coding.  
> FoodInfo for Mod compatibility and more.  
> Register list of RegistryObject with a list.  
> Abstract Data Generators.  
> Bedrock Entity Model (WIP!)
